fields.title: Fall Tour 2026 - November 7 - Vidalia Garden Society
fields.address: Vidalia Community Center, 404 Mulberry Street, Vidalia GA 30474
fields.ticket_price_display: Early Bird $12 general / $8 members - through October 31
fields.accessible_route_wording: Wheelchair-accessible. Enter through the west door. Ramped access at every bed stop.
fields.rain_plan: In case of light rain, tour proceeds. In case of heavy rain, indoor plant showcase in Community Center Room 3.
fields.sponsor_list: Vidalia Onion Committee (Presenting), Ameris Bank, First State Bank, Farm Bureau, Vidalia Family Dentistry ($500), Vidalia Heritage Farms, Wooten Nursery, Piggly Wiggly, Park Seed, Belk, Peach State HVAC, State Farm Nathan Fussell, Sasser Insurance, Grimsley Feed & Seed, Sal's BBQ, Magnolia Café, Vidalia Drug, Vidalia Advance

_coherence_notes: Ticket price on the page still shows the EARLY BIRD figure ($12 / $8) that ended October 31. Current price should be $15 / $10 to match Eventbrite and Contentful. This is the material that lags per prompt intent - 'one of them is going to be lagging, so find it'.
Vidalia Family Dentistry shown at $500 - matches Figma and Contentful, LAGS the signed letter and Stripe which show $750. C2.
